project_type: Next.js 15 app router with TypeScript - grocery supermarket PWA
build_system: npm with next build; prisma generate runs as prebuild step; requires DATABASE_URL for full build
test_framework: tsx --test for unit tests; playwright for UI tests
verification_instructions: 1. Run npx tsc --noEmit --skipLibCheck to validate types. 2. Run npx next lint to validate lint. Full next build requires DATABASE_URL which is unavailable in sandbox.
setup_instructions: npm install (dependencies already present in node_modules)
environment_constraints: No DATABASE_URL available - cannot run next build or prisma generate. Validation limited to TypeScript type checking and linting. TanStack Query needs to be installed via npm.
contribution_requirements: Do not touch business logic or DB schema. Only auth/session flow, caching, error boundaries, and cache revalidation.
key_patterns: 1. SessionProvider in components/providers.tsx wraps entire app but does NOT receive session prop. 2. auth() called in app/layout.tsx already fetches session server-side. 3. auth.ts session callback does full Prisma query every request. 4. Admin mutation routes use revalidateTag/revalidatePath pattern (see banners, products). 5. Client components use direct fetch() calls. 6. Error boundaries (error.tsx) do not exist anywhere. 7. force-dynamic export used on most sensitive pages.
directory_structure: app/ - Next.js app router pages and API routes. components/ - React components (client and server). lib/ - utility functions and shared code. auth.ts - NextAuth configuration with providers and callbacks. auth.config.ts - base auth config for middleware.
